description_long: This is a slip-on shoe featuring a vibrant, multicolored woven textile upper with a geometric pattern. The dominant colors are red, white, blue, and black, with a central starburst motif on the toe area. The shoe has a low-profile, flat brown sole and a brown trim around the opening, giving it a casual yet stylish appearance. The sides display a repeating diamond pattern in red, blue, and white, while the back is rounded and fully enclosed. The interior appears to be lined with a smooth, tan material, likely synthetic or leather. The overall construction suggests comfort and breathability, suitable for everyday urban wear.
description: A colorful slip-on shoe with a woven geometric pattern in red, white, blue, and black, featuring a flat brown sole and brown trim. The design is casual and eye-catching, ideal for urban settings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shoe, highlighting the red woven upper with blue and white diamond patterns and brown trim.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the rounded toe with a central starburst motif in red, white, and black, and the brown trim around the opening.
description_view_2: Opposite side view emphasizing the continuous geometric pattern and the flat brown sole.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the enclosed heel with the woven pattern wrapping around and the brown trim at the top.
